safe_claim: Retained carrier/state must precede readout for bridge-admissible comparison.

safe_claim: A projection is acceptable only if it preserves enough retained state to determine next admissible transition.
do_not_say: Do not convert operational bridge into identity proof.
kill_test: Exhibit a bridge projection that loses retained state but still determines all next transitions under the operator family.
